title.rendered: British Travel Awards 2022- Proud Nominees – Voting Open!

content.rendered:
For the fourth year running, we are proud to announce that Travel FX has been nominated as Best Retailer for Forex/Travel Money Retailer at this year’s British Travel Awards.

The British Travel Awards are like the Oscars of the travel industry and among the most sought-after recognition of excellence, as they acknowledge the quality of service that travel companies offer their clients.

We are up against some much bigger companies and high street names, so we know we face a challenge. However, we always strive to have the best rates for currency and excellent service, so we are hoping that will put us in good stead.

Travel FX customers have always been so generous in taking your time to review our service, we are hoping that you’ll extend that generosity to voting for us in the BTA’s. The awards are decided purely on the public vote, we would be very grateful if you could spare a moment to vote for us.

What’s more, you could be winning too. When you vote, you’ll be automatically entered into a generous prize draw where you can win prizes including luxury stays, flights, holiday vouchers and much more. All you have to do is fill in the form and cast a vote. Not only will you be helping us out, but you might win a great prize too.

As current winners of the silver award, we would like to send a massive thank you to our loyal customers and the public for voting for us year after year and recognizing us as one of the UK’s best Travel Money retailers. We are committed to always offering the best prices on currencies and excellent service and are proud to have such an amazing team that makes it all possible.

So, if you think we deserve to win (and if you want to have the chance to win great prizes too) then please vote for us.

Thanks and good luck!

Voting is open now, until Sunday 2nd October

itemListElement.name: British Travel Awards 2022- Proud Nominees – Voting Open!

@graph.name: Travel FX Blog
@graph.description: Travel money news and tips from Travel FX

@graph.name: Lucy Reed
@graph.description: Hi! I’m Lucy, as well as writing blog posts I lead Customer Experience and UX at Travel FX. With over 15 years’ experience in the foreign exchange industry, I specialise in helping UK travellers understand exchange rates, avoid unnecessary fees, and feel confident about their travel money before they fly. Having lived both in the UK and overseas, and travelled extensively over the years, I understand first-hand how important it is to get the details right when you’re planning a trip. From managing your travel budget to choosing the right foreign currency or travel money card, small decisions can make a big difference.
